Rusty Spiked Shoulderpads  
 


Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 3
STR: +5
SV MAGIC: -10
WT: 2.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Rusty Spiked Shoulderpads

Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 3
STR: +5
SV MAGIC: -10
WT: 2.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 8 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:18
Lucy Entry By:Atarak
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-04 02:58:35
Page Updated:Tue Aug 6th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 3pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 10
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Blackburrow
NPC Name
a gnoll commander - Blackburrow
Mannan of the Sabertooth
Refugee Splitpaw - Blackburrow
Socho Darkpaw
Splitpaw Commander - Blackburrow


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Blackburrow


Uploaded January 6th, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Still Dropping on Teek
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2024 at 12:19 PM Rating: Decent
Xordoom
3 posts
Once you have the camp and the bridge locked down you can kill the Commanders and Refugee fairly quickly, they are on a 7 minute timer (roughly). Got 2 Rusty Spiked Shoulderpads in about 1 hour... These are great for giving to charmed pets to lower their magic resist's so you have less Charm breaks...

Best way to get here is to enter Blackburrow and fall through the tree on the left, you'll land in water and this is where the bridge camp is (Just clear placeholders (Shaman, Elite Gnoll's), the main camp is same area but further in by the spikes on the floor...
▲ Page top
Rusty Spiked Shoulderpads

Pet gear
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2016 at 10:41 AM Rating: Decent
Ozcar
2 posts
Enchanters out there on TLP, this is a cheap, easily farmable option to give to charm pets and assist with all those resists.

261 posts

▲ Page top
SLAM
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2001 at 12:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767614808
55 posts
The only reason to wear these in place of banded/ring shoulders is to slam magic only mobs like wisps and ghouls. If you're a melee class, don't give up ac for stats. If you're a cleric or shaman don't give up ac for any stat but wis. And neg10 mr? 'Nuff said.
▲ Page top
i hate this
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2001 at 11:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757581727
8 posts
i have these and the are good for str witch i need i also need my sv magic SO... i need a shoulder pad that has 10 or so str but has ok ac 5 or so and no -10 sv magic!! plz RE me and tell me what they have. I can only dig up about 200pp being a nontwimk is hard hehe (i only have 176 wis at lvl 27 =0) but i have no money i was given my stuff by my good friend in his will ( he had to quit the game /cry ) i am in loio and on the nameless server plz contact me their or here r e-mapl me at clayjoe3106@hotmail.com

▲ Page top
Fine for a while...
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 8:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249588337
15 posts
I've been wearing these for a while since I got them from a clover room raid but I'm going back to my banded mantle since I started noticing far more damage from orc shamen and other casters. Might have considered keeping them if I was a Warrior but as a Shaman I'd rather have better AC than higher STR...

QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2001 at 12:55 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Killed Splitpaw Commander as L 10 Barb Rogue. I'm strong enough and have great armor - where's the best place to sell this?

Not worth it
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2001 at 12:52 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Takes away 10 magic and is not worth it later in life
▲ Page top
RE: Not worth it
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2001 at 4:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756968804
Scholar
28 posts
At levels below 15 where you rarely run into magic users it is a good deal. I have reached level 18 wearing it although when you run into strong magic users like Splitpaws and Orc Shamen it can be uncomfortable. I have seen this dropped a couple of times in BB.

287 posts
ive spent plenty of time in black burrow and ive seen about 3 drop. off refugee splitpaw and off gnoll commanders. i raised a 12 ranger, 9 shaman, 14 monk, and 17 druid all in bb. probably the best drop that they have along with the onyx earrings.

1 post
Got one off an elite in blackburrow. It is good verse the fighters and nonmagic users,
but when I get into a fight with the gnoll shaman, I switch back to banded armor. It seems to help their casting ability.
